config.ldap.password_save_failed: Failed to save password to vault.
help.ldap.enabled: Enables the LDAP/AD integration. The agent can then search users and groups, authenticate credentials, and more.
help.ldap.bind_password: Bind password for LDAP authentication. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.
help.ldap.readonly: When enabled, the agent can only read from LDAP. All write/modify operations are blocked.
help.ldap.host: Hostname or IP address of your LDAP/Active Directory server (e.g. ldap.example.com or 192.168.1.10).
help.ldap.port: LDAPS port (default: 636). Use 389 for plain LDAP without TLS.
help.ldap.use_tls: Use LDAPS (recommended). Disable only for plain LDAP on port 389.
help.ldap.insecure_skip_verify: Skip TLS certificate verification. Only enable for self-signed certificates.
help.ldap.base_dn: Base DN for all LDAP searches (e.g. dc=example,dc=com).
help.ldap.bind_dn: Service account DN for binding (e.g. cn=admin,dc=example,dc=com).
help.ldap.user_search_base: Subtree for user searches (defaults to base_dn if empty).
help.ldap.group_search_base: Subtree for group searches (defaults to base_dn if empty).
